passive.name: Unseen Predator
passive.description:
While in Brush, Rengar leaps at his target with his basic attack.

Rengar generates Ferocity whenever he casts an ability. At Max Ferocity, his next ability is empowered.

Killing enemy champions awards trophies on Rengar's Bonetooth Necklace, granting bonus attack damage.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Rengar}} generates {{as|Ferocity|buzzword3}} when he casts a basic ability or uses ''{{ais|Savagery|Rengar}}'' empowered attack, which expires after a period [[out of combat]]. At max {{as|Ferocity|buzzword3}}, his next basic ability consumes them to become empowered with an additional effect, gain an extra cast, and briefly grant him {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate - Bonetooth Necklace:}} '''Rengar''' generates a permanent [[File:Bonetooth Necklace.png|20px|link=]] ''Trophy'' stack for each unique {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy {{tip|champion}}, gaining {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Unseen Predator:}} '''Rengar's''' basic {{sti|attack range}} is increased and causes him to {{tip|dash|leap}} to the target. This generates {{as|Ferocity|buzzword3}} if he had none at one point.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Innate:}} '''Rengar''' generates {{as|1 Ferocity|buzzword3}} upon casting a [[Champion ability|basic ability]] or using ''{{ais|Savagery|Rengar}}'' first attack. At {{as|4 Ferocity|buzzword3}}, his next basic ability consumes them all to become empowered with an additional effect and grant him an additional cast along with {{sti|ms|{{pp|key=%|30 to 50 for 3|1 to 13|color=ms}} {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds. All {{as|Ferocity|buzzword3}} is lost after 10 seconds of being [[combat status|out of combat]].

Reaching {{as|4 Ferocity|buzzword3}} with ''{{ai|Savagery|Rengar}}'' or ''{{ai|Bola Strike|Rengar}}'' locks the empowered version of the ability from being cast for {{fd|0.1}} seconds. Similarly, consuming all {{as|Ferocity|buzzword3}} with an empowered ability locks the unempowered version of the ability from being cast for {{fd|0.1}} seconds if it is not already on cooldown, increased to {{fd|0.25}} seconds for ''{{ai|Battle Roar|Rengar}}''.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate:}} While in {{tip|brush}}, '''Rengar''' gains ''Unseen Predator'', which lingers for {{fd|0.35}} seconds upon exiting brush. ''Unseen Predator'' is lost immediately if '''Rengar''' exits the brush using {{si|Flash}} or {{si|Hexflash}}.
wiki_detail.description3:
{{sbc|Unseen Predator:}} '''Rengar's''' [[basic attack]]s have massively increased range and cause him to {{tip|dash|leap}} to the target's location, attacking the target upon arrival and landing closer than his normal {{tip|melee}} range. ''Unseen Predator'' will generate {{as|1 Ferocity|buzzword3}} on-hit if none of his {{tt|{{as|current Ferocity|buzzword3}} was generated this way|The next use of Unseen Predator after consuming all Ferocity from an empowered ability will count for this effect}}. {{as|Ferocity|buzzword3}} generated by ''Unseen Predator'' has a {{tt|{{as|distinct color|buzzword}}|Ferocity generated by spells are white}}.

'''''Rengar''' can cast any of his abilities during the dash.''
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|Innate - Bonetooth Necklace:}} Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy {{tip|champion}} within 3 seconds of damaging them grants '''Rengar''' a ''Trophy'', once per unique champion and up to 5. An additional ''Trophy'' is made available through the event ''[[The Hunt is On!]]'' with the [[File:Head of Kha'Zix.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Head of Kha'Zix''. ''Trophies'' grant {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}} equal to {{as|{{pp|type=[[File:Bonetooth Necklace.png|20px|border|adjustsize|link=]] Trophies|key=%|x^2 for 6|x;Head of Kha'Zix|formula=(Number of Trophies) * (Number of Trophies)}} '''bonus''' AD}}.
wiki_detail.target range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|50|Landing distance from target's location at dash start, determines dash length}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Rengar''' will not leap to targets already in his normal [[basic attack]] range.
* While {{tip|ground|grounded}} or {{tip|root|rooted}}, '''Rengar''' loses the enhanced {{sti|attack range}} from ''Unseen Predator''.
* '''Rengar''' will only leap to a target if his basic attack timer has been refreshed (if not so he will not automatically attempt to path towards his target, despite them being within leap range).
* Only {{si|Flash}} and {{si|Hexflash}} instantly end ''Unseen Predator''. Other effects (i.e {{si|Teleport}}) will still cause the buff to linger upon leaving {{tip|brush}}.
* '''Rengar''' can freely use any [[champion ability|abilities]], [[summoner spell]]s, or [[active ability items|item actives]] while leaping.
** Using a {{tip|dash}} or {{tip|blink}} ability will interrupt the leap.
* The leap's attack will have no effect if the target dies or becomes {{tip|untargetable}}. {{ais|Savagery|Rengar}} empowered attack will always be consumed.
* The attack from the leap will:
** ''Not'' go off if the dash was interrupted.
** Go off at the end of the dash even if its normal destination is obstructed by boundaries he cannot cross (e.g. terrain, {{ai|The Hextech Ultimatum|Camille}}).
** Go off regardless of distance the enemy travels away from '''Rengar's''' original location.
** Go off even if '''Rengar''' loses {{tip|sight}} of the target.
* {{iis|Rapid Firecannon}} and {{ais|Savagery|Rengar}} '''bonus''' ranges are lost after {{fd|0.25}} seconds upon gaining ''Unseen Predator'', and are re-gained after {{fd|0.25}} seconds upon losing ''Unseen Predator''.
* '''Rengar''' has a resource bar that indicates how much {{as|Ferocity|buzzword3}} he currently has.
* ''Bonetooth Necklace'' uses different icons corresponding to the number of stacks acquired: 
** {{sbc|1 Stack:}} [[File:Bonetooth Necklace.png|20px|border|link=]] 
** {{sbc|2 Stacks:}} [[File:Bonetooth Necklace 2.png|20px|border|link=]]
** {{sbc|3 Stacks:}} [[File:Bonetooth Necklace 3.png|20px|border|link=]]
** {{sbc|4 Stacks:}} [[File:Bonetooth Necklace 4.png|20px|border|link=]]
** {{sbc|5 Stacks:}} [[File:Bonetooth Necklace 5.png|20px|border|link=]]
** {{sbc|6th Stack:}} [[File:Head of Kha'Zix.png|20px|border|link=]] '''Head of Kha'Zix'''

Q.name: Savagery
Q.description:
Rengar's next Attack brutally stabs his target for bonus damage.

Ferocity effect: deals increased damage and grants Attack Speed.
Q.tooltip:
Rengar's next 2 Attacks gain {{ asbonus }}% Attack Speed. The first Attack deals {{ qtotaldamage }} physical damage.

Max Ferocity: The first Attack deals {{ empoweredqtotaldamage }} physical damage and grants Rengar {{ empoweredqas }} Attack Speed for {{ asduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rengar}} gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for his next two basic attacks. His next basic attack deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} and will {{tip|critically strike}}, dealing increased damage based on his {{sti|{{as|critical strike chance}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Savagery 2|Rengar|Ferocity}} Bonus:}} ''Savagery's'' damage is modified and '''Rengar''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Rengar''' empowers his next two basic attacks within 3 seconds to gain {{sti|{{as|40% '''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.

His first attack has an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, gains {{sti|range|25 '''bonus''' range}}, and deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, reduced by 40% against [[structures]]. The attack will {{tip|critically strike}} for {{as|{{critical damage|0|100}}|ad}} {{as|(+ {{critical damage|{{ccd|Rengar|crit_base}}|100|mod=0.75|base = 100}} critical strike chance)|critical chance}} {{as|AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|{{tt|Bonus Physical Damage|The wiki denotes only the bonus damage, not the total scaling}}|{{ap|30 to 150}} {{as|(+ {{ap|0 to 15}}% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Ferocity Bonus:}} ''Savagery's'' damage is modified. '''Rengar''' gains {{as|{{pp|key=%|50 to 101}} '''bonus''' attack speed}} for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Empowered Bonus Damage|{{pp|30 to 135 for 8; 145 to 235|formula = 15 + 15 per level until level 8, then + 10 per level}} {{as|(+ 30% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The {{tip|critical strike}} modifier scales up to 75% of the {{sti|{{as|critical damage}}}} champions usually have, based on '''Rengar's''' {{sti|{{as|critical strike chance}}}}.
* ''Savagery's'' empowered attack is not consumed by [[jungle plants]].
* The enhanced attack applies other {{tip|on-hit}} effects as well as {{stil|life steal}} as normal (the bonus damage cannot).

W.name: Battle Roar
W.description:
Rengar lets out a battle roar, damaging enemies and healing for some of the recent damage he has taken.

Ferocity effect: additionally breaks crowd control effects.
W.tooltip:
Rengar roars, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to nearby enemies and restoring {{ damagepercentagehealed }}% of the damage taken in the last {{ healingwindow }} seconds as Health.

Max Ferocity: Deals {{ totaldamageempowered }} magic damage and additionally cleanses Rengar of crowd control.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Rengar}} stores [[Health#Grey health|grey health]] equal to a portion of damage taken within a brief moment.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rengar''' roars, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and consuming his [[Health#Grey health|grey health]] to {{tip|heal}} himself.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Battle Roar 2|Rengar|Ferocity}} Bonus:}} ''Battle Roar's'' damage is modified. '''Rengar''' also {{tip|cleanse|cleanses}} from {{tip|crowd control}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Rengar''' stores 50% of the {{tt|post-mitigation damage|Damage calculated after modifiers}} he has taken in the last {{fd|1.5}} seconds as [[Health#Grey health|grey health]] on his [[health bar]], increased to 100% of damage taken from {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rengar''' roars, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{as|{{pp|65 to 130}} '''bonus''' magic damage}} to {{tip|monsters}}, and consuming his [[Health#Grey health|grey health]] to {{tip|heal}} for the same amount.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Ferocity Bonus:}} ''Battle Roar's'' damage is modified. '''Rengar''' {{tip|cleanse|cleanses}} himself from all {{tip|crowd control}}.
wiki_detail.notes: * ''Grey health'' will not be consumed upon casting ''Battle Roar'' despite visually appearing so. It will only ever expire after its duration ends.
wiki_detail.tips: * If '''Rengar''' uses both ''Battle Roar'' and its empowered version in quick succession he will heal for 100% of the damage he received in the last few seconds.

E.name: Bola Strike
E.description:
Rengar throws a bola, slowing the first target hit for a short duration.

Ferocity effect: roots the target.
E.tooltip:
Rengar throws a bola, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage to the first enemy hit, revealing and Slowing them by {{ slowamount }}% for {{ ccduration }} seconds.

Max Ferocity: Deals {{ totalempowereddamage }} physical damage and Roots for {{ ccduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rengar}} throws a bola in the target direction that deals  {{as|physical damage}} and briefly {{tip|slow|slows}} the first enemy hit, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Bola Strike 2|Rengar|Ferocity}} Bonus:}} ''Bola Strike's'' damage is modified. The target is {{tip|root|rooted}} instead of {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rengar''' throws a bola in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy hit and {{tip|slow|slows}} them for {{fd|1.75}} seconds, as well as {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them for 2 seconds and granting {{tip|sight}} of a 150-unit radius around them for the same duration.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Ferocity Bonus:}} ''Bola Strike's'' damage is modified. The target is {{tip|root|rooted}} instead of {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.cast time: {{tt|{{fd|0.25}}|While not leaping}} / {{tt|None|While leaping with Unseen Predator}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* If '''Rengar''' casts {{ai|Savagery|Rengar}} and/or {{ai|Battle Roar|Rengar}} during ''Bola Strike's'' cast time, he will buffer them and cast them when ''Bola Strike'' completes.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

R.name: Thrill of the Hunt
R.description: Rengar's predatory instincts take over, Camouflaging him and revealing the nearest enemy champion in a large radius around him. During Thrill of the Hunt, Rengar gains Move Speed and he can leap to the tracked enemy without being in brush, reducing their armor.

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rengar''' prowls for some time, gaining {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}. After a short delay, he also becomes {{tip|camouflage|camouflaged}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3:
During this time, '''Rengar''' will detect the nearest enemy champion in range, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them for the remaining full duration. As he approaches, he will [[File:Thrill of the Hunt 2.png|24px]] mark the nearest detected enemy.

'''Rengar's''' next basic attack will deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, then {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|reduce the target's armor}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Rengar''' also gains ''{{ai|Unseen Predator|Rengar}}'' while {{tip|camouflage|camouflaged}} from any source.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rengar''' prowls for a duration, gaining {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}. After a 2-second delay, he also becomes {{tip|camouflage|camouflaged}}.
wiki_detail.description3: During this time, '''Rengar''' will detect the nearest enemy champion in range, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} and gaining {{tip|sight}} of a 100-unit radius around them. Enemies detected are {{tip|true sight|revealed}} for the remaining full duration.
wiki_detail.description4: The nearest detected enemy within 1600 range is also marked, alerting all of their allies within 1200 range about '''Rengar's''' presence.
wiki_detail.description5: '''Rengar's''' next basic attack within {{tt|normal attack range|125 range}} against any enemy or with ''Unseen Predator'' to the marked enemy deals {{as|50% AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} and inflicts {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|armor reduction}}}} for 4 seconds.
wiki_detail.description6: [[Basic attack|Attacking]] or casting [[champion ability|abilities]], other than ''{{ai|Savagery|Rengar}}'', ends ''Thrill of the Hunt'' immediately.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Thrill of the Hunt's'' duration starts on-cast.
* The armor reduction applies ''after'' the attack.
* The {{tip|true sight}} reveal on the target stays until the leap finishes.
* '''Rengar''' discerns a distinct [[File:Thrill of the Hunt 3.png|24px]] ''heart beat'' instead of the usual {{tip|true sight}} indicator. This indicator will be removed when out of range, but the target will remain revealed.
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the end of the attack windup.
* ''Thrill of the Hunt'' has an indicator that appears above the target(s) when Rengar is nearby. Some skins have a unique indicator.
